meta.title: LLM Optimizer Results Portal
meta.notes: Static portal data with Track 3 official README history plus curated local runs.
meta.source_path_policy: Remote absolute paths are replaced with public source labels in this published snapshot.

suites.title: modded-nanogpt Track 3

comparability_constraints.hardware_scope: Step metric is comparable; wall-clock depends on GPU

card.headline: Official key references plus our AdEMAMix negative result are curated.

suites.notes: Leaderboard is suite-local and ranked by known steps_to_target_3_28. Runs that did not reach target remain traceable but display as not reached. Official references are reference-only and should not be mixed with benchmark or muP suites.

leaderboard_meta.description: Muon with aux Adam, lr=.02 wd=.01
AdamW lr=0.0015 wd=0.1 betas=(0.9, 0.95) warmup_steps=250 (note: this is most likely undertuned)
Muon with aux Adam, lr=.025 wd=.0125

AdamH (Adam preconditioning + hyperball constraint on hidden matrices) with per-module init std (attn.proj std=.026, mlp.proj std=.031, mlp.fc std=.031, qkv default), lr=.018 betas=(0.9, 0.95) warmup_steps=250 h_cooldown_frac=1.0 aux_cooldown_frac=.4
MuonH (Muon + hyperball constraint on hidden matrices) with per-module init std (attn.proj std=.026, mlp.proj std=.031, mlp.fc std=.031, qkv default), lr=.018 h_cooldown_frac=1.0 aux_cooldown_frac=.4
Muon with aux Adam, lr=.025 wd=.025
Muon² with aux Adam, lr=.10 wd=.0125 β₂=.95 ε=1e-10

NorMuonH (Muon NS direction + Adafactor-style row/col variance preconditioning, then hyperball constraint on hidden matrices) with per-module init std (attn.proj std=.026, mlp.proj std=.031, mlp.fc std=.031, qkv default), lr=.018 mu=0.95 beta2=0.95 h_cooldown_frac=1.0 aux_cooldown_frac=.4, end 25 steps early
NorMuon with aux Adam + u/w-floor (wd-free strategy that clamps ‖u‖_F / ‖w‖_F to 0.35), lr=.0375
NorMuon lr=0.035 wd=0.025, end 50 steps early
Setup from #9 plus Contra-Muon technique (note: p-value vs. #9 is p=0.69)
Muon with aux Adam, lr=.035 wd=.025 following #10, end 25 steps early following #8

NorMuonH (#8) wrapped in MuLoCo-style outer Nesterov SGD (Algorithm 1, K=1) over all trainable params, outer_lr=0.7 outer_momentum=0.5 sync_interval=30 (= 107 outer steps) (note: p-value vs. #11 is p=0.099, and vs. #8 is p=0.029)
Setup from #11, plus SOAP preconditioning before Muon orthogonalization, as in SOAP-Muon, for the MLP weights.
Newton-Muon with activation-covariance right-preconditioning refreshed every 64 steps before the Muon Newton-Schulz update (details); tuned lr/wd per param type
Setup from #14, plus SOAP precond for attention with trust gate (note: p-value vs. #14 is p=0.34)
Setup from #11, plus Aurora
PMuon (Muon + bilateral streaming covariance power preconditioning), lr=.035 wd=.025 γ=.3 β=.95
Setup from #8, with NorMuonH replaced by KL-SOAP with hyperball optimization, precondition_frequency=1, lr=.018, beta1=.95, beta2=.9, shampoo_beta=.9
Setup from #16, plus power lr schedule from Yash Pande, plus interpolation between Contra-Muon and new method Soft-Muon
Shampoo(lr=0.0015, wd=0.2, betas=(.9, .95), precond_freq=5, power=-1/4)
SpectralDescent(lr=.03, wd=.015) == Muon(lr=.03, wd=.015, mu=0) == Shampoo(lr=0.03, wd=0.015, betas=(0, 0), precond_freq=1, power=-1/4)
Muown (Muon with integrated row-norm control), direction_scale=0.2, power LR cooldown, V-norm schedule
Setup from #11, with split LR cooldown: aux AdamW cooldown_frac=0.4 and matrix cooldown_frac=0.8
Setup from #19 KL-SOAP-H, plus power LR decay over a 3125-step horizon with nonzero Adam/KL-SOAP LR floors
SinkSOAP: Gram-Sinkhorn SOAP-style preconditioning with NorMuon postconditioner, lr=0.04 wd=0.025, does not use power lr schedule
Setup from #19, with KL-SOAP replaced by SOAP with hyperball optimization, w.o. bias correction, precondition_frequency=1, lr=.018, beta1=.95, beta2=.9, and tuned lr schedule
Setup from #20, plus radial brake: dampens outward radial updates before the u/w floor
Setup from #29, plus Aurora row-balanced polar on wide mlp.proj matrices, Soft-Muon/NorMuon-lite disabled, Contra-Muon ramp extended to step 2500, and Muon momentum warmup/cooldown from track 1
Setup from #23 Muown, plus NorMuon-style normalization, Contra-Muon, and power-law cooldown
Setup from #20, plus a SODA-style hidden-matrix anchor correction toward initialization, faded out with a cosine schedule from step 2000 to 2750
PSGD with Kronecker whitening preconditioners, Hyperball, lr=.025 linearly decayed over the full run, precond_lr=1.0, beta=0.95
Setup from #30, plus late capped RRE vector extrapolation from step 2820 to 2925 with k=4, damping=.875, and max relative update=.001
Our AdEMAMix tuned 3350
Our NorMuon WandB 20-step probe

claims.title: Muon-family official references land within 0.004 loss of the Track 3 target.

comparison.method_label: R15 Newton-Muon / R10 NorMuon / R12 Muon

caveats: Steps-to-target uses the currently imported known checkpoint step; finer-grained official logs can refine it later.
Imported official history references are reference-only.

claims.title: Best Muon-family reference beats the AdamW snapshot by 0.00302 final loss.
caveats: This claim compares final validation loss, while the suite leaderboard is ranked by steps-to-target.
Imported official history references are reference-only.

claims.title: Our legacy AdEMAMix Track 3 port completed normally but underperformed NorMuon.
caveats: This is a legacy local migration profile: wsd + lr=3e-4 + warmup=250.
It should not be treated as the benchmark124m_scaled AdEMAMix profile.

figures.title: Track 3 Validation Loss Curves
figures.caption: Default Track 3 comparison set; additional official history rows can be selected into the chart.
